title: Pagans Blessing
description: Explore pagan culture and traditions by performing rituals and creating mystical artifacts to help you on your journey
body:
# Pagan's blessing


## Description

Pagan's blessing is a mod about performing runic rituals, brewing mystical items and exploring pagan & nordic cultures.

Begin your mystical journey by crafting an imbuing cauldron and anvil for crushing your materials and start performing runic rituals or grow a cozy garden.

On your journey you will learn how to obtain powerful and magical artifacts to help and assist you.

Summon creatures with a **pentacle** or keep them away with a **wican ward**

Become a zombie hunter with the **athame** or fight your friends in an infinite snowball battle using the **eternal snowball**

There is even more to explore so I recommend you try out the mod for yourself

## Help & Info
